_publications._publicationTitle: Longitudinal phenotype development in a minipig model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: In our cohort of 8 NF1+/ex42del minipigs we did not see indication of optic glioma or optic chiasm tumor...Measurement of the optic nerve and sheath indicated no significant difference (p > 0.19) between NF1+/ex42del and wildtype
details: No indication of optic glioma or optic chiasm tumor in cohort of 8 NF1+/ex42del minipigs, with no significant difference (p > 0.19) in optic nerve and sheath measurements compared to wildtype
